---
title: "Software"
description: "Research software and code."
---

::: {.project-card}
### RandomizedLinearAlgebra.jl

A planned Julia package for randomized solvers, randomized eigensolvers, sketching, and low-rank approximation.

**Status:** prototype.
:::

::: {.project-card}
### FlowSolvers.jl

Prototype implementations for gradient-flow and momentum-flow solvers for linear systems.

**Status:** experimental.
:::

::: {.project-card}
### PDF-to-blog importer

This template includes a small script:

```bash
python scripts/pdf_to_post.py path/to/file.pdf
```

It produces a draft Quarto post. Math-heavy PDFs still need manual cleanup.
:::
